MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-12-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GAIA FINANCE, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: (1) THE SHERIFF SHALL RELEASE THE $316.99 AND ANY OTHER HELD FUNDS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR; (2) THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL REMIT $150/PAY PERIOD ($300/MONTH) TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GAIA FINANCE, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is granted as follows: (1) the sheriff shall release the $316.99 and any other held funds to the judgment creditor; (2) the judgment debtor shall remit $150/pay period ($300/month) to the judgment creditor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
